title: cousinia actinia subsp. brachyphylla
intro: Cousinia actinia subsp. brachyphylla, also known as Cousinia brachyphylla, is a flowering plant species belonging to the aster family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, protecting against oxidative stress, and potentially exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Cousinia brachyphylla can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, as well as being used in tinctures or dried for later use, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and applications.
